checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: The implementation adds a bounded local read-only MCP-style runtime under issue #234, updates catalog/readiness surfaces, adds tests and documentation, and records stale PR #227 reconciliation evidence.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: specbridge-mcp-runtime lists three resources, reads each known resource URI, rejects mutation-like methods such as tools/call and resources/write, rejects unknown URIs, and reports readonly_local_runtime through specbridge-mcp-resources and standard readiness.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: The change does not add network MCP transport, mutation-capable tools, dependency installation, .mcp config, CI workflow changes, secrets, production, billing, auth, database, deployment, cleanup enforcement, artifact retention enforcement, issue #194 changes, or digital twin implementation.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: The runtime only calls existing repository-local resource builders and returns deterministic JSON. Unsupported and mutation-capable methods return ok=false with deterministic errors.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: Changed files are declared in the issue-234 execution contract and scope manifest.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: validate-contracts, validate-contract-scopes, test-specbridge-cli, validate-final-reports, validate-audit-packets, validate-chatgpt-audits, specbridge-smoke, git diff --check, and manual runtime probes passed locally before PR creation.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: GitHub Actions passed on PR #235 head 49063f68279d9bd53b29fe88fa6c90a33c5058ea: Foundation Validation, SpecBridge Review Gate, SpecBridge PR Review Report, and Claude Review Non Blocking.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report states complete status, records local validations, passed GitHub Actions, PR #235 merge, issue #234 closure, post-merge closure evidence, and no deployment.

findings.evidence: The runtime is intentionally a local MCP-style CLI harness, not a network MCP server transport.
findings.recommendation: Keep full MCP server transport blocked until a future dedicated contract authorizes it.

findings.evidence: Repository health still reports branch and artifact debt with cleanup_permission=none and retention_enforcement=none.
findings.recommendation: Do not delete, prune, archive, compress, or move branches/artifacts without a future active cleanup contract.

unresolved_risks: This is a local MCP-style harness, not a network MCP server transport.
Mutation-capable MCP tools remain intentionally blocked.
Branch cleanup and artifact retention debt remain observable but unenforced by policy.
